title: Evergy: Take Advantage Of The 10-Year High Dividend Yield Of 4.2%
text: Evergy has provided a total return of -2% since I recommended purchasing the stock, mostly due to an unforeseeable event, the Ukrainian crisis, which led to 40-year high inflation. However, EVRG has become markedly attractive from a long-term perspective.

title: Evergy: A Recession-Resistant Investment To Pick Up In A Market Correction
text: Evergy, Inc. is an electric utility that serves some of the largest cities in Kansas and Missouri. Evergy should enjoy a strong customer base and stable cash flows in a challenging economic environment.

title: Evergy (EVRG) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Evergy (EVRG) first-quarter earnings and revenues rise y/y.

title: Evergy Inc (EVRG) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Evergy Inc (EVRG) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.59 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.56 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.58 per share a year ago.
